item.title: Version 0.1.1
item.description:
Bug Fixes

  • Filter-aware cache preloading: The preview preload window now only includes visible (unfiltered) photos. Previously, filtered-out photos were being loaded into the cache and evicting previews you actually needed.
  • Atomic workspace save: Fixed a data-loss bug where group assignments could be wiped if the app was killed between two separate SQLite writes. Photos and groups are now saved in a single transaction, so group_id is always consistent — resolving the issue where photos from unrelated shoots would get lumped into one group after restarting with filters active.
